sector_rows.may_claim: W trace closes as on-shell EW codomain completion under separate PDG2025 and CMS2026 ledgers; max |z|=0.528997.
sector_rows.must_not_claim: physical-final global EW fit, zero residual, or unauthorized PDG+CMS combined average.
sector_rows.open_boundary: full EW global-fit/correlation ledger if one wants global-combination finality

sector_rows.declared_codomain: pole masses with APF envelope; QED running boundary typed
sector_rows.may_claim: charged-lepton APF pole branch is complete within APF/CODATA envelope; QED route and external ledger boundary are typed.
sector_rows.must_not_claim: QED-running final, physical-final lepton masses, zero residual, or QED residual fitting.
sector_rows.open_boundary: full external QED running coefficient/threshold/covariance ledger if running masses are requested

sector_rows.may_claim: charm APF trace exports to MSbar self-scale candidate and is inside PDG2025 quoted 90CL envelope.
sector_rows.must_not_claim: physical-final charm mass, zero residual, pole mass, or full perturbative/lattice QCD finality.
sector_rows.open_boundary: full QCD covariance/evaluator finality beyond PDG comparison envelope

sector_rows.may_claim: bottom APF trace exports to MSbar self-scale candidate and is inside PDG2025 quoted 90CL envelope.
sector_rows.must_not_claim: physical-final bottom mass, zero residual, pole mass, or full perturbative/lattice QCD finality.
sector_rows.open_boundary: full QCD covariance/evaluator finality beyond PDG comparison envelope

sector_rows.may_claim: top closes in the finite-resolution direct-reconstruction MSR codomain; pole branch is explicitly blocked by four-loop conversion.
sector_rows.must_not_claim: top pole final, MC equality, physical-final top mass, zero residual, or target-fitted reconstruction scale.
sector_rows.open_boundary: external MC calibration ledger if one wants a MC-parameter interpretation; pole branch remains knocked out

sector_rows.may_claim: APF light-quark source side is complete and identity/scalar transport is knocked out.
sector_rows.must_not_claim: light-quark numerical export to MSbar(2 GeV), physical-final light masses, or identity transport.
sector_rows.open_boundary: source-independent chiral/lattice evaluator U_chilat with scale setting, action, Z_m, EM/isospin, matching, covariance

accomplishments.closeout: G1-G6 are derived as APF admissible-continuation requirements; trace values do not self-export to physical observables
on-shell EW codomain completion under separately frozen PDG2025 and CMS2026 ledgers
pole-codomain APF completion with CODATA2022 audit and QED boundary typed
self-scale MSbar covariance admitted under PDG2025 90CL ledgers
direct-MSR EW-resolution completion; 4-loop pole branch knockout retained
not assigned to any sector or whole program in v64

no_smuggling_rules.rule: no inverse solving from target masses
no_smuggling_rules.blocked_example: constructing T_l or residual operators by inverting (m_e,m_mu,m_tau); choosing R_fit from top direct target
T_uds identity as MSbar(2 GeV); trace anchors directly as scheme masses

no_smuggling_rules.rule: no treating direct/MC top as exact pole mass
no_smuggling_rules.blocked_example: using m_t^pole,4loop as the direct top measurement codomain

no_smuggling_rules.rule: no QED/QCD running as residual knobs
no_smuggling_rules.blocked_example: choosing alpha, thresholds, loop order, or route coefficients to erase residuals

no_smuggling_rules.rule: no unauthorized averaging of external ledgers
no_smuggling_rules.blocked_example: combining PDG2025 and CMS2026 W masses without correlation protocol

no_smuggling_rules.rule: no light-quark export without chiral/lattice evaluator
no_smuggling_rules.blocked_example: reporting u,d,s MSbar(2 GeV) from APF source vector alone

gates.name: codomain declared
gates.closeout_form: Every sector has a declared scheme/codomain before comparison; top and light quarks show why this matters.

gates.name: transport map supplied
gates.closeout_form: Every promotion above trace/source requires a typed map; missing U_chilat blocks light-quark export.

gates.name: constants ledger
gates.closeout_form: External constants and conventions are separated from APF trace anchors; CODATA/PDG/CMS ledgers are recorded as external.

gates.name: covariance protocol
gates.closeout_form: Residuals are interpreted only through declared comparison envelopes or covariance ledgers.

gates.name: no-smuggling audit
gates.closeout_form: Target reuse and target-fitted scales/operators are forbidden and quarantined as diagnostics only.

gates.name: residual channels assigned
gates.closeout_form: Nonzero residuals remain visible and are assigned to route/codomain/covariance/external-ledger channels.

next_queue.reason: v64 is a stable endpoint and should be folded into the export theorem/paper before new derivations

next_queue.program: external chiral-lattice evaluator for light quarks
next_queue.reason: only path to numerical u,d,s MSbar(2 GeV) export
only path beyond separate W ledger audits

next_queue.program: full QED running external coefficient ledger
next_queue.reason: needed only for running lepton masses, not pole closeout
needed only for MC-parameter interpretation; APF direct-MSR codomain already closed

headline: Trace-to-scheme export architecture is closed; global physical-final sector is not claimed.
